creator: grahamperrin@freebsd.org
text:
Two cherry-picks from recent discussion, the second of which helps with comment #0

<https://markmail.org/message/2ueydxm22v23cxcb> from imp@

> … Most of the advice in appendix c is dated and doesn't really match 
> what people do on the lists. …

<https://markmail.org/message/zyjdxug45xgzjz2b> from bapt@

> Note that the mailing list engine will reject html only email, 
> html is fine as long at it is created with text/plain alternative.
> 
> Note that only the text/plain alternative will be used to construct 
> the archive, …
